_meta.note: Source UI string catalog. Keys are dot-paths; values are the English text. Translators: keep every key path identical, translate only the values, and preserve {{placeholders}} and product tokens (app name, file names, URLs, CLI flags) verbatim.
_meta.translation_workflow: Regenerate xx.json from this file with an AI pass, then native-review.

preferences.language_restart_note: Restart {{app_name}} for the language change to take effect.

locale_labels._comment: Native endonyms for each supported UI language.
